text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > General Laboratory Tests 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANY LAB TEST NOW ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides direct access to clinical lab tests, paternity and DNA, alcohol and other toxicology testing services. Test results should be discussed with a physician or healthcare provider. 19289 SW Martinazzi Avenue Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm (541) 343-2398 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER FOR NATURAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides naturopathic physicians, chiropractors, and acupuncturists who specialize in women's, pediatric, geriatric, and family health care, cardiovascular, pulmonary, and endocrine dysfunction. Also provides health counseling and education, full laboratory services, stress management and stress reaction restructuring. 1330 SE Cesar Chavez Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 232-1100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Medical clinic provides basic health care services, diabetic counseling, physical therapy, limited psychiatric care, referrals to specialists, lab and radiology exams, and prescription medication. 865 NW Reiman Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Uninsured or underinsured individuals Hours: Medical Clinics: -Monday/Friday 8am-10am, Wednesday 6pm-8pm Patients are seen on first come, first serve basis. For Psychiatric, Diabetic Education, Women's Health, and Physical Therapy Clinics: Call for information Email (541) 758-3000 110 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC EAST LINN COMMUNITY CLINIC MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Medical clinic provides basic health care services, diabetic counseling, physical therapy, limited psychiatric care, referrals to specialists, lab and radiology exams, and prescription medication. 1600 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Uninsured or underinsured individuals Hours: Medical Clinics: -Monday/Friday 8am-10am, Wednesday 6pm-8pm Patients are seen on first come, first serve basis. For Psychiatric, Diabetic Education, Women's Health, and Physical Therapy Clinics: Call for information Email (541) 758-3000 110 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FANNO CREEK CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, mental health evaluations, psychiatric services, counseling, and physical therapy. On-site clinical lab provides mammography, radiology, ultrasound, and echocardiography services. Focus on women’s health and HIV/AIDS patients. 2400 SW Vermont Street Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older Hours: Clinic Hours Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Lab Hours Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:45pm Email (503) 452-0915 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES WEST SALEM CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. Provides urgent care clinic for current patients only. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary health care, mental health evaluations, and counseling. Services include routine physicals, women’s health care, behavioral health care, diabetes management, and counseling, physical therapy, specialty care and referrals to specialists, respiratory therapy, and smoking cessation. Has a pharmacy on-site where patients have access to some medications at no charge. 2260 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older -Gross household income 85%-300% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Uninsured patients who meet Volunteers In Medicine eligibility guidelines -Patients who do not qualify for any state funded health care -Oregon Health Plan and Medicare patients not yet assigned to a provider or unable to get a provider -Insured patients with a deductible of $2,500 or more -Medical condition not caused by a motor vehicle accident covered by insurance or a work-related illness or injury that involves Workers' Compensation coverage. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8pm (541) 685-1800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANY LAB TEST NOW ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE CENTER FOR NATURAL MEDICINE CENTER FOR NATURAL MEDICINE COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC MEDICAL CLINIC COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC MEDICAL CLINIC FANNO CREEK CLINIC FANNO CREEK CLINIC NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES PRIMARY CARE NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES PRIMARY CARE VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC
